fields.label: Card source
fields.rationale: Document Type aggregates rows of a DocType with a filter. Report extracts a column from an existing Report. Custom calls a whitelisted Python method returning {value, fieldtype, route?, route_options?}. Each source uses different subset of fields below.

fields.label: Source DocType (for type='Document Type')
fields.rationale: Required when type='Document Type'. Empty for Report / Custom. If document_type is a child table (istable=1), parent_document_type is also required.

fields.label: Parent DocType (if document_type is a child table)
fields.rationale: Required when document_type names a child table. Frappe queries the child table filtered by its parent.

fields.label: Aggregation function (for type='Document Type')
fields.rationale: Required when type='Document Type'. Count doesn't need aggregate_function_based_on; Sum / Average / Minimum / Maximum all require a numeric field in aggregate_function_based_on.

fields.label: Numeric field (for Sum / Average / Min / Max)
fields.rationale: Required when function != 'Count'. Names the numeric field on the source DocType. Empty when function='Count'.

fields.label: Report name (for type='Report')
fields.rationale: Required when type='Report'. Names an existing Report whose output feeds the number.

fields.label: Column in the Report (for type='Report')
fields.rationale: Required when type='Report'. Names a column in the Report's output - not validated at save, fails at render if the column doesn't exist.

fields.label: Report aggregation (for type='Report')
fields.rationale: Required when type='Report'. How to aggregate the named report_field across rows. Note: Count is NOT valid here - for a Count card, use type='Document Type' with function='Count' instead.

fields.label: Whitelisted method path (for type='Custom')
fields.rationale: Required when type='Custom'. Dotted Python path to a whitelisted function returning {value, fieldtype, route?, route_options?}. Validation is deferred to runtime - typos fail silently on render.

fields.label: Filters (JSON string)
fields.rationale: JSON list of Frappe filter triples. '[]' means 'across all rows of the DocType' - if the user's ask implies any filter ('pending', 'this month', 'overdue'), DO NOT default to empty.

fields.label: Public (all users)
fields.rationale: 0 = only the owner sees it. 1 = all users. Dashboards for everyone typically use is_public=1 cards.

fields.label: Show trend vs prior period
fields.rationale: Default on. Shows the percentage change vs the previous stats_time_interval window. Disable for absolute-only KPIs where 'up vs down' would confuse.

fields.label: Trend window
fields.rationale: Compares current value vs same-field value from the previous period. Daily works for most real-time KPIs; switch to Weekly / Monthly for slower-moving metrics.

fields.label: Accent colour
fields.rationale: Subtle accent on the card face. Frappe's default blue is safe; switch to red for warning KPIs (overdue) and green for healthy KPIs (on-time).

fields.label: Card background colour
fields.rationale: Optional. Overrides the card's default background. Empty uses the theme's card surface colour.

fields.label: Show full number (no abbreviation)
fields.rationale: Default 0: values are abbreviated (1.2M, 42K) for readability. Set 1 when precision matters (financial KPIs where the exact amount is the signal).

fields.label: Dynamic filters (JSON)
fields.rationale: JSON list of filter triples evaluated at RENDER time (useful for 'current user' / 'this month' / 'today'). Complementary to filters_json (which is evaluated at save time and frozen).

fields.label: Filter UI definition (for type='Custom')
fields.rationale: Required when type='Custom'. JSON defining the filter UI controls exposed to users of this card (label, fieldname, fieldtype, options). The corresponding Custom method receives these filter values. Empty for Document Type / Report sources.
